raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The bill AB 2747 requires landlords to give tenants the option to opt into reporting their positive rent payments to a credit bureau agency.",
    "Many renters spend a majority of their income on rent and prioritize their rent payments over all other expenses each month.",
    "On-time rent payments are not currently reflected on tenants' credit scores, whereas missed rent payments negatively impact those scores.",
    "Millions of renters in California are paying their rent on time but do not see a positive impact on their credit scores.",
    "AB 2747 will require landlords of buildings with more than 15 units to allow renters to opt into positive rent reporting for their credit scores."
  ]
}
```
